basic_info.headline: MTS at Anthropic | ex-Googler
basic_info.about:
Self driven and willing to solve complex problems.
Love programming and algorithm.

experience.title: Staff Software Engineer / Software Engineering Manager
experience.description:
Led a team of 8 Software Engineers (distributed MTV/SEA) within Ads Identity Infrastructure under Ads Privacy, a horizontal group ensuring user privacy. 

+ Provided critical technical leadership in shaping and implementing Ads compliance strategy in close collaboration with Legal, Business, UX, and Product partners. Drove the architecture and evolution of Ads privacy & identity infrastructure, ensuring robust compliance for all Ads products against complex regulations including Digital Market Act (DMA), US State Laws (incl. UOOM provision), new GDPR rulings, while enabling responsible business innovation (e.g. improved ads for opt-out users), protecting billions in annual Ads revenue.

+ Spearheaded Ads Privacy initiatives across all Ads measurement products, co-leading an org-wide effort to achieve 100% coverage by 2026 and serving as the main privacy liaison for ads measurement teams. After auditing hundreds of products to surface coverage gaps and briefing leadership, I co-authored a multi-year roadmap to close each gap, address accumulated technical debts, and define new infrastructure patterns—unlocking hundreds of millions in future revenue and laying the groundwork for ongoing privacy innovations.

+  Ensured operational excellence for high-scale infrastructure serving xx M peak QPS (all servers combined). Achieved 99.99% availability and latency targets through continuous optimization.

+ Built a high-performing team, fostering significant professional growth (resulting in 5 promotions) and successfully hiring 3 engineers; consistently recognized in the top ~30% of managers via annual surveys across all aspects.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer / Technical Lead Manager
experience.description:
+ Architected and led the team (as TL/TLM) in launching foundational infrastructures: 1) new  cookie enabling critical functionality (e.g. anti-fraud) across web (Search Ads) and mobile (Map Ads), key component of the new opt-out compliant Ads experience; 2) unified IP-Geo infrastructure driving xxx M ARR improvement through enhanced accuracy, resource savings and tech debt fixes; 3) ephemeral ID encryption framework adopted across 10+ teams (>20 Ads servers/pipelines), boosting developer velocity and security.

+ Spearheaded technical strategy and execution for critical privacy compliance initiatives across Search Ads, YouTube Ads, and Display Ads, delivering new Ads serving modes mandated by regulations like the EU ePrivacy Directive / GDPR / multiple US States Laws /etc and industry standards like IAB TCF v2 / GPP / etc.

+ Architected and delivered a novel user ID serving infrastructure for Ads products with higher ID sharing standards, solving unique challenges including low-latency global replication / data ephemerality / encryption / etc, now handling xx K peak QPS and expanding. 

+ Promoted to Tech Lead Manager (June 2022) in recognition of outstanding technical leadership and impact.

experience.title: Software Engineer
experience.description:
+ Developed key components of Google's IAB TCF v2 infrastructure and Ads CCPA opt-out infrastructure used by all Display Ads products, ensuring GDPR & CCPA compliance.

+ Optimized Display Ads clickserver, reducing x K QPS of HTTP redirection and improving resource efficiency.

+ Founding member of Ads Identity Infrastructure team, significantly contributed to the initial bootstrap of the main server, developing A/B experiment features, data push functionality and addressing backend server dependencies.

experience.title: Software Development Engineer Intern, Transaction Risk Management Systems
experience.description: Built a data visualization tool for Amazon’s internal fraud detection system to help investigators analyze bot activity. This involved structuring large volumes of event data (stored in S3), then creating an interactive web dashboard that reduced false-positive bot alerts by making patterns more observable.

projects.name: Tickplus-Time management system based on SNS
projects.description:
1) Designed web pages using HTML, JavaScript and JQuery
2) Facilitated group discussion on database and UI design

projects.name: Multimedia Search
projects.description:
1) Designed a Qt application that processes multimedia queries (A/V clips) and returns a list of similar videos based on color, sound and motion. 
2) For each matched video, a histogram shows the time variation trend of similarity will be displayed.
